page_content:
Prerequisite: JOUR601 or JOUR801.

JOUR729 Reporting from Annapolis and Washington (6 Credits) Advanced training in public affairs journalism. Students report state and federal news as part of College's Capital News Service.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

JOUR734 Salzburg Seminar. Global Media Literacy (3 Credits)

An advanced analysis of the information, values and underlying messages conveyed via television, newspapers, the Internet, magazines, radio and film from a cross-cultural perspective. Examines the accuracy of messages and explores how distinctive global media shape view
